task: Review risks and safeguards for a bounded local replay gauntlet comparing visible-only replay and pond-backed lineage replay across five public-safe entropy scenarios. Do not validate public claims. Do not infer broad capability. Return bounded pressure, replay-separation cautions, claim-boundary cautions, and required evidence checks only.

context.summary: Hard gate for Proof 017 artifact construction. The exercise will use deterministic public-safe fixtures and compare two replay modes under degradation. This request asks only for neutral risk review, evidence requirements, and claim-boundary constraints before construction.
constraints: compare visible-only replay and pond-backed lineage replay only within bounded local scenarios
